content: Phase 1: Backend API setup - partner inquiry, contact, events endpoints + Mongo
Phase 2a: Foundation - CSS tokens, fonts, routing, SiteLayout (Nav + Footer)
Phase 2b: Home page - Hero, LogoMarquee, Flywheel, Stakeholders, Gallery, CTA
Phase 2c: Inner pages - Who It's For, Events, Community
Phase 2d: Remaining pages - Membership, Partner (with form), About Us
